annotation_record.business_purpose: Stores additional information or comments related to a document or data item.

change_request.business_purpose: Tracks formal requests to modify the current state of an asset, process, or system.

checklist.business_purpose: Records items that need to be verified or completed as part of a process or task.

checklist_template.business_purpose: Tracks the templates for checklists used in various processes such as audits and reviews.

comment.business_purpose: Stores notes or remarks made by individuals about documents, projects, or other matters.

counterparty_details.business_purpose: Records detailed information about counterparties, including their identities and financial data.

counterparty_supplementary_info.business_purpose: Stores additional information and contact details for counterparties involved in financial transactions.
counterparty_supplementary_info.primary_entity: A counterparty's supplementary information including name, type of business, contact details, etc.

dashboard_items.business_purpose: Defines items that can be displayed on dashboards for monitoring and reporting purposes.
dashboard_items.primary_entity: An item or component of a dashboard, including its type, key, title, and description.

dashboards.business_purpose: Holds information about dashboards used for monitoring and reporting in various systems.
dashboards.primary_entity: A dashboard, which is a collection of items designed for specific monitoring or reporting needs.

document_category_master.business_purpose: Stores categories for documents to organize and manage them.

document_ingestion_registry.business_purpose: Tracks the ingestion process for documents, including when and where they were ingested.
document_ingestion_registry.primary_entity: Record of a document ingestion event

document_tag_mapping.business_purpose: Maps documents to their associated tags for categorization and searchability.
document_tag_mapping.primary_entity: Mapping between a document and its tag

document_tags.business_purpose: Stores tags associated with documents for categorization and filtering purposes.

document_type_master.business_purpose: Defines the types of documents, including their characteristics and associated metadata.

documents.business_purpose: Tracks detailed information about each document, including its creation and update history.

external_users.business_purpose: Stores information about external users who can access the system.
external_users.primary_entity: An external user of the system.

feature.business_purpose: Stores information about features or modules available in the system.
feature.primary_entity: A feature or module within the system.

group.business_purpose: Stores information about groups, which may be used for role-based access control or other purposes.
group.primary_entity: A group of users or entities within the system.

incident.business_purpose: To track and manage the lifecycle of incidents, including their status, reason, investigation details, and resolution.
incident.primary_entity: An incident record in the system.

incident_signal_score.business_purpose: To store and analyze the signal scores related to incidents, including scores for different types of signals.
incident_signal_score.primary_entity: A record of signal scores for an incident.

investigation_and_research_counter_party.business_purpose: To track and manage the investigation details for counter-parties, including their status, owned by, and investigation date.
investigation_and_research_counter_party.primary_entity: An investigation record for a counter-party.

level.business_purpose: To store and manage different levels of data or processes in the system.
level.primary_entity: A level within the system with a display name and description.

ml_predictions.business_purpose: To store predictions made by machine learning models, including results and metadata.
ml_predictions.primary_entity: A single prediction made by a machine learning model.

ml_use_case.business_purpose: To store different use cases for machine learning models and their associated metadata.
ml_use_case.primary_entity: A specific use case for a machine learning model with details like name and description.

module.business_purpose: The module table stores information about different functionalities or sections within a system.
module.primary_entity: A module or functionality of the system.

notification.business_purpose: The notification table records events and actions that require some form of communication or alerting.

organizations.business_purpose: The organizations table stores information about different entities or groups within an organization.

party_research.business_purpose: Records information related to various types of research conducted by parties.
party_research.primary_entity: A specific piece of research conducted by a party.

password_policy.business_purpose: Stores details about password policies, including their approval status and associated notes.

password_rule.business_purpose: Defines the rules and values associated with each password policy, indicating whether they are active.
password_rule.primary_entity: A specific rule within a password policy.

password_security_questions.business_purpose: Stores security questions and their answers for user authentication purposes.
password_security_questions.primary_entity: A security question with its example answers.

permission.business_purpose: Defines the permissions available within the system, which can be assigned to users or roles.
permission.primary_entity: A permission with its code and description.

research_type.business_purpose: Stores different types of research that can be conducted within the system.

rfi_comments.business_purpose: Stores comments and annotations related to RFI (Request for Information) instances.
rfi_comments.primary_entity: A single comment or annotation associated with an RFI instance.

rfi_instance_questions.business_purpose: Stores questions and additional information related to RFI instances for support documentation.
rfi_instance_questions.primary_entity: A single question or piece of additional information associated with an RFI instance.

rfi_objects.business_purpose: Stores the state and metadata of RFI instances throughout their lifecycle.
rfi_objects.primary_entity: An RFI instance with its current state and related information.

rfi_questions.business_purpose: Stores information about the questions related to Request for Information (RFI) processes.
rfi_questions.primary_entity: A single question in an RFI process.

rfi_responses.business_purpose: Stores the responses provided for questions in Request for Information (RFI) processes.
rfi_responses.primary_entity: A single response to a question in an RFI process.

rfi_templates.business_purpose: Stores pre-defined templates for Request for Information (RFI) processes, including their details and configurations.
rfi_templates.primary_entity: A single template used for creating RFI processes.

role.business_purpose: Stores information about different roles within an organization.

role_permissions.business_purpose: Links roles to specific permissions, defining what actions can be performed by each role.
role_permissions.primary_entity: Relationship between a role and its permissions

rule.business_purpose: Defines rules or policies that need to be adhered to, such as compliance rules or risk management guidelines.

sampling.business_purpose: Tracks the process of data sampling for various compliance and risk management activities.
sampling.primary_entity: A single instance of a data sampling activity.

signal_assignments.business_purpose: Records the assignments of signals to various entities for risk management and fraud detection purposes.

signal_categories.business_purpose: Defines the categories into which signals can be classified for easier management and analysis.

signal_levels.business_purpose: Defines the levels of signals that can be used in various compliance and risk management processes.
signal_levels.primary_entity: A level or category of a signal used in specific tables.

signal_rules.business_purpose: Contains the rules and logic that define how signals are processed, evaluated, and scored within various compliance and risk management processes.
signal_rules.primary_entity: A rule or set of instructions for processing a signal.

signal_score_assignments.business_purpose: Records the scores and weights assigned to signals, reflecting their impact in various compliance and risk management processes.
signal_score_assignments.primary_entity: A record of a signal's score and weight assignment.

signal_typologies.business_purpose: Defines the types of signals used in various workflows.
signal_typologies.primary_entity: A type of signal used in workflows.

sla_config.business_purpose: Stores configuration settings for Service Level Agreements (SLAs).
sla_config.primary_entity: A specific configuration of an SLA.

sla_instance.business_purpose: Tracks the instances of Service Level Agreements (SLAs).

sla_scheduled_action.business_purpose: Tracks scheduled actions related to Service Level Agreements (SLA).

state.business_purpose: Defines the states in a process or workflow, including initial and final states.
state.primary_entity: State of a process or workflow.

table_embeddings.business_purpose: Stores embeddings for table names, which can be used for similarity searches and analysis.

tenant_info.business_purpose: Stores configuration and metadata for each tenant.

transaction.business_purpose: Records financial transactions including status, currency, and whether they require annotation.

transition.business_purpose: Records the steps or stages in a process, including status and creation details.

user_groups.business_purpose: Tracks associations between users and groups they belong to.
user_groups.primary_entity: A many-to-many relationship between a user and a group.

user_permissions.business_purpose: Records permissions granted to users, potentially overridden or not.
user_permissions.primary_entity: A permission granted or denied to a user.

user_profile.business_purpose: Stores individual user profiles containing various settings and preferences.

user_prompt.business_purpose: Records prompts created or updated by users, including their content and status.

user_roles.business_purpose: Tracks the roles assigned to each user, linking users to their permissions and responsibilities.

user_security_question.business_purpose: Stores security questions and answers for users to ensure account recovery compliance.

user_user_permissions.business_purpose: Tracks the permissions granted to each user, ensuring access control and compliance with authorization policies.

workflow.business_purpose: Defines the workflows that are used to manage processes, tasks, and business logic across the organization.
